input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

# Convert counts to integer matrix (DESeq2 requires integers)
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts)
mode(counts_matrix) <- 'integer'

# Check dimensions
cat("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_matrix), "genes ×", ncol(counts_matrix), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_matrix,
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created\n")
print(dds)
